Submit two PUT /api/account/wishlist requests at the same time, each adding a different item
Fetch /api/account/wishlist
identifiedBugs.actualBehavior: Final wishlist had race item A=true, race item B=false; one save appears to have overwritten the other.

stepsToReproduce: Run node ui-i18n-smoke.mjs
Open the listed routes in German and English across mobile and desktop viewports
Inspect overflow, control labels, html lang, translation keys, and German copy

stepsToReproduce: Ensure e2e-lina@wishees.local has no connected friends
Log in as e2e-lina@wishees.local
GET /friends/wishlist?invite=user-12&lang=de
Read /api/friends/connected for Lina
identifiedBugs.actualBehavior: The read-only viewer page visit created a Lina -> Alex friend connection. Before the page visit, Lina connected friends was []; after the page visit, Lina connected friends contained Alex user 12.
